release_name: New versioning scheme. Update to spglib interface.
release_body:
This is a minor maintenance release.

* The versioning scheme is switched to the one based on  git tags and 'git describe' produced strings and made conformant to PEP 440 (presumably).

* The new interface of spglib is accommodated.
Fixed issue with embedded datetime objects in the responses.
- Fixed `File not found` error on Windows.

- Fixed bug where `wal -R` wouldn't work.
- Various cleanup and refactoring.
- Proper arg handling for `-R`, `-i` and `--theme`.

The text for the caption is now returned clean (tags removed). The cue text could contain tags like:
* timestamp tags: *<00:19.000>*
* class tags: *<c.classname>text</c>*
* and others...
**Important**: It currently removes any tag present in the cue text. For example <b> would be removed.

Also a new attribute is available on captions to retrieve the text without cleaning tags: **raw_text**
- Fix hashlib.scrypt calls with large values

release_name: Optimization and refinements done for Home-Assistant
release_body: Optimization and refinements done for Home-Assistant.

* Redesigned Python API
* Add option to exclude servers, and allow `--server` and `--exclude` to be specified multiple times
* Address Exception issues
* Print errors to stderr
* Remove deprecated `speedtest_cli.py`
- Fix `CustomerAttribute` declaration
* Bug fix release
* Minor updates
Fixes Vary:Origin header sending behavior when regex origins are used.

The module has been published to PyPI.

View HISTORY.rst of the module for a changelog.

https://pypi.org/project/azure-cli-lab/0.0.8

Full release notes at https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/cli/azure/release-notes-azure-cli

## Changelog
- Fix test_thread_safe azure gateway failure (#619) <ebozduman>
- Fix put_object negative test case to fail properly (#615) <Harshavardhana>
- Fixes 2 tests failing for gateway azure (#617) <ebozduman>
- fix test_list_objects_with_prefix bug when listing (#613) <Harshavardhana>
- enable MINT_MODE=full for travis tests (#614) <Harshavardhana>
See change log https://github.com/neo4j/neo4j-python-driver/wiki/1.0-changelog
The "datasets.data_export_to_file()" function now supports streaming to disk, which prevents a potential python memory error.
Fixes #261 , which prevented users from using a DigitalOutput.
SPI hardware [write_readinto](https://circuitpython.readthedocs.io/en/3.x/shared-bindings/busio/SPI.html#busio.SPI.write_readinto) working. Tested on MCP3008.

1.0.10 (2018-07-11)
===================

Bug Fixes
---------

- Fixed a bug which prevented the inclusion of all markers when parsing requirements from existing pipfile entries.  pypa/pipenv#2520 (#26)
- requirementslib will now correctly handle subdirectory fragments on output and input for both pipfile and pip-style requirements. (#27)

### Changed
- Added a new release target which will build images on each new release that can be used to run unit tests.
- Updated concepts instance delete function to handle new response
Released on 04/04/2017.

* Adjusted support for explicit key cached decorator to ensure it takes into account args and kwargs when calculating the key name 

* Support for CircleCI
Minor bug fixes
* #370: resolve `SSLCertificateId` also for custom `Listeners`
